hero.title: NestJS + Nuxt 4
hero.subtitle:
Production-ready starting point for full-stack applications.
Deploy in minutes, scale to production.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: No magic. Every decision is explained and obvious from the code.

idiomatic.title: Idiomatic
idiomatic.desc: Follow NestJS and Nuxt conventions, don't reinvent the wheel.

production.title: Production-ready
production.desc: Docker, env validation, error handling — from day one.

monorepo.title: Monorepo
monorepo.desc: Shared package for types and i18n. Backend and frontend in one repo.

main.label: Base
main.desc: Starting point without a database. Users CRUD is stored in-memory.

postgresPrisma.label: PostgreSQL
postgresPrisma.desc: Adds PostgreSQL and Prisma 7 on top of the base variant.

auth.label: Auth
auth.desc: JWT authentication on top of postgres-prisma: email + password, httpOnly cookies, sessions in DB.
